response.justification: Candidate is an experienced individual contributor (15+ years) with breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and some distributed systems work, but the resume shows no evidence of the executive-level competencies this CTO role requires: no team leadership at 10-to-30 scale, no architectural ownership of production multi-agent AI systems, only ~1 year of fintech exposure (RIDE Capital), and no experience governing hybrid/outsourced engineering or communicating roadmap to a board. The AI-agent work mentioned at Acme is described as contribution-level, not architecture or production operation of agentic systems in regulated environments.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across backend, web, and embedded — solid IC depth
Some high-throughput distributed systems exposure (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, millions RPS)
Touch points with fintech (RIDE Capital) and current exposure to MCP/agentic tooling at Acme
concerns: No demonstrated leadership of engineering organizations (10→30+) or development of a senior tech leadership layer
No production multi-agent AI systems ownership, evaluation infra, or agentic framework architecture experience
Lacks regulated fintech depth (credit risk, working-capital, compliance across jurisdictions) and board/executive-level communication track record

key_factors.factor: No executive leadership or team-scaling track record
Missing production multi-agent AI architecture experience
